author: Toei Animation
text:
Who is Cure Éclair? | Star Detective Precure! | Episode 21 Trailer | First Candidate, Eriza Kurusu
Star Detective Precure! Official Next Episode 21 trailer: Who is Cure Eclair? First Candidate, Eriza Kurusu 

Who is Cure Eclair? There are four candidates...
Let’s deduce who Cure Eclair is and cast your vote! 
Voting starts on Sunday, June 21, on the special website!

Starting with Episode 21, the long-awaited Cure Éclair Arc finally begins!
Watch closely all four episodes from Episode 21 (June 21) through Episode 24 (July 12), and let’s work together to deduce who Cure Éclair will be before Episode 25!

Once you’ve deduced who Cure Eclair might be, be sure to cast your vote on the official campaign website! We’d also love for you to share your theories on social media using the hashtag #WhoIsCureEclair.

Voting Period:
Sunday, June 21, 2026, 8:00 AM JST – Sunday, July 19, 2026, 8:00 AM JST

Voting Page:
Official website special campaign page (one vote per day)
https://www.toei-anim.co.jp/tv/precure/camp_cureeclair

Watch the latest episode of the new series, simulcasting every Saturday on Crunchyroll!

Watch on Crunchyroll: https://bit.ly/41TqPvR

#StarDetectivePrecure #Precure #Anime
